mapper.select: /* selectReasonCodeRelations */ select -- A.COMPKEY, A.WAREKEY, A.DOCCATE, B.DOCCTNM, A.DOCTYPE, B.DOCTYNM, A.RSNCODE, A.RSNCDNM from MRSCMA A inner join MDOCMA B on A.COMPKEY = B.COMPKEY and A.WAREKEY = B.WAREKEY and A.DOCCATE = B.DOCCATE and A.DOCTYPE = B.DOCTYPE where A.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} order by A.COMPKEY, A.WAREKEY, A.DOCCATE, A.DOCTYPE, A.RSNCDOD

/* selectMcodemList */ select concat(COMPKEY,COMCDKY,COMCDVL) as ROWKEY , COMPKEY , COMCDKY , COMCDVL , WAREKEY , COMKYTX , COMCDTX , COMCDOR , COMCDSY , CDCATE1 , CDCATE2 , CDCATE3 , CDATTR1 , CDATTR2 , CDATTR3 , COUSEYN , FN_COM_TODATE(CREDATE) as CREDATE , FN_COM_TOTIME(CRETIME) as CRETIME , fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, CREUSER) as CREUSER , FN_COM_TODATE(LMODATE) as LMODATE , FN_COM_TOTIME(LMOTIME) as LMOTIME , fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, LMOUSER) as LMOUSER , UPDTCHK from V_MCODEM where COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and ACTYN = 'Y'
and UPPER(COMCDKY) like UPPER(concat('%',#{comcdky},'%'))
and UPPER(COMCDVL) like UPPER(concat('%',#{comcdvl},'%'))
and UPPER(COMKYTX) like UPPER(concat('%',#{comkytx},'%'))
and UPPER(COMCDTX) like UPPER(concat('%',#{comcdtx},'%'))
and WAREKEY = #{warekey}
order by COMCDKY, COMCDOR asc
